justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including relative dates like "this Sunday" and "two Sundays from now," and specific time ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed the closest available slot after multiple rejections, but it could have offered a few more options in the same turn when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, but it made several redundant check_availability calls in Turn 4 for dates it had already implicitly checked or confirmed as unavailable.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was generally positive, with the agent being polite and persistent in finding an available slot, though the multiple checks in Turn 4 could have been slightly smoother.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by expanding its search and offering the closest available slot, but it did perform some redundant checks for dates that had already been implicitly covered as unavailable.
